subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned unto the Countenance, and give him glad-tidings of that which hath been ordained for him by God, the Bestower, the Most Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الوجه و نبشره بما قدر له من لدی الله المعطی الکریم و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
